title: GSR 818 Commissioner for Indus Waters 15.06.1962
text: "GIITIUD No. D. la of Inbia --.EXTRAORDINARY PART I1-Section 3-Sub-sectlon (I) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY NBW DELW, FRIDA.Ys JUNE 15, 196~/JYAISTHA 25, l~ MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 15th June 1962 G.S.R. 818.-In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 of the United Nations (Privileges and Immunities) Act, 1947 (46 of 1£)47), the Central Government hereby declares that the provisions of Article IV (sections 11, 12, 13, 14, 15 and 16) of the Schedule to the said Act shall apply mutatis mutandis to the Commissioner for Indus Waters, Government of Pakistan, and to his Advisers and Assistants. [No. F. 6(30)P-III/61.] s. K. BA'NEB.JI, Jt. Secy. ( 377) PRINTED.
